name: Patient 13
history: Death of close aunt considered a mother figure. Did not fulfill aunt's last request and wasn't present at death. Pattern of prioritizing others' needs.
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: I failed my aunt when she needed me most.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm a terrible person who abandoned someone I loved.
situation: Reflecting on memories involving the aunt and the unfulfilled request.
auto_thought: I should have been there. I'll never forgive myself.
behavior: Ruminate about aunt's death and unfulfilled promises.
